hooks.command: input=$(cat); case "$input" in *'"git push'*) case "$input" in *'CSUBMIT=1'*) ;; *) echo 'BLOCK: Run /csubmit instead of pushing directly.' ;; esac ;; esac

hooks.prompt: Before the session ends, update .claude/patterns.md with any new conventions, architectural decisions, or gotchas discovered this session (prune outdated entries). Then prepend a new entry to .claude/changelog.md with today's date and bullet points summarizing what was done this session. Keep both files concise and actionable.
Read .claude/patterns.md and .claude/changelog.md to familiarize yourself with the codebase and recent work. If either file is missing, create it. Do not mention this to the user unless they ask.
